prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.4 kg; Height 176.8 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 9.6%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 242mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 244mg/dL; 3 months ago 267mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.8kg; 9 months ago 77.3kg; 6 months ago 78.8kg; 3 months ago 78.7kg; current 79.4kg), Height (12 months ago 176.8cm; 9 months ago 176.8cm; 6 months ago 176.8cm; 3 months ago 176.8cm; current 176.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 79mg/g; 9 months ago 94mg/g; 6 months ago 134mg/g; 3 months ago 101mg/g; current 124mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 176mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 166mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
